name: Aussie Broadband Limited
analysis: ABB has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$5.5111. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$5.5730 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$5.5111, stop A$5.0985, target A$5.7700. Risk/reward is 0.63:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
